name: 希望与绝望间 Between Hope and Despair
author: Chad Pines

name: 黑道
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知两名存活且阵营对立的玩家：如果他们之中其中一名玩家被处决，一名与他同阵营的存活玩家醉酒直到下个黄昏。
flavor: Of course... I'll sacrifice the lives of everyone here if it guarantees my survival.

name: 王女
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知三名玩家的角色：其中有且只有一名玩家的角色是正确的。
flavor: Guiding my people along the right path is the duty of a ruler!

firstNightReminder: The Robot either shows the "no" head signal or points to a player.
otherNightReminder: If the Robot died today or tonight: show the number signal (0, 1, 2, ...) for how many players they chose are evil. If they're alive, the Robot points to a player.
name: 机器人
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：当你死亡时，在当晚你会得知你选择的玩家中有多少名邪恶玩家。
flavor: There are notable differences between us, but they're nothing for me to be ashamed of.

name: 侦探
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择除你以外的两名玩家：下个白天，你可以拜访说书人并得知一条与他们相关的信息。
flavor: Some lies can lead the world to hope... Some truths can lead the world to despair...

firstNightReminder: The Photographer points to a player. Show the Photographer the character of one of that player's neighbor. If that player is evil, show them any character instead.
otherNightReminder: The Photographer points to a player. Show the Photographer the character of one of that player's neighbor. If that player is evil, show them any character instead.
name: 摄影师
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名与之前不同的玩家：你会得知一名与他邻近的非旅行者玩家的角色。如果你选择了一名邪恶玩家，你得知的信息由说书人决定。
flavor: No matter what kind of photo it is, the moment captured in it only exists at that time.

firstNightReminder: The Martial Artist chooses a player.
otherNightReminder: The Martial Artist chooses a player. Then, if the Martial Artist has not used their secondary ability, they either give the "no" head signal, or "yes" and all chosen players are safe from the Demon tonight.
name: 格斗家
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择除你以外的一名玩家。每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以选择让恶魔的负面能力对被你选择的所有玩家无效。
flavor: If you want to hurt someone, hurt ME!

firstNightReminder: The Mechanic points to 2 players. Place the Mechanic's "Correctly Registers" reminder tokens next to those players' characters.
otherNightReminder: The Mechanic points to 2 players. Place the Mechanic's "Correctly Registers" reminder tokens next to those players' characters.
name: 机械师
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择两名玩家：他们不会因其他角色的能力被当作错误的角色，直到下个黄昏。
flavor: I'll definitely fix it up till it's like brand new!

otherNightReminder: Show the finger signal (0, 1, 2, 3) for how many evil players were nominated yesterday.
name: 昆虫博士
ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知在今天白天时有多少名邪恶玩家被提名。
flavor: No bad person likes bugs.

otherNightReminder: The Clairvoyant points to a player. If they would die tonight, give the hand signal (thumbs up good, thumbs down bad) for the alignment of each of that player's neighbors.
name: 占卜师
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：如果他当晚被恶魔选中了，你会得知他和与他邻近的玩家的阵营。
flavor: Clairvoyance is clairvoyance!! Don't put it in the same category as cattle mutilation!

otherNightReminder: If 5 or fewer players are alive: the Astronaut dies.
name: 宇航员
ability: 所有玩家都知道你是宇航员。如果小于等于五名玩家存活，你死亡。
flavor: As long as you stay alive, anything's possible. You can even go to the stars...

otherNightReminder: If the Programmer has not yet used their ability: the Programmer either shows the "no" head signal, or points to a Townsfolk character. If that character is in-play and dead, the Programmer gains their ability.
name: 程序员
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以选择一名镇民角色：如果他是在场的且已死亡，你获得他的能力。
flavor: If I don't do something, nothing's ever going to change.

otherNightReminder: If the Child Caregiver died tonight: the Child Caregiver points to a player. If that player is evil, they die.
name: 保姆
ability: 当你得知你死亡时，你要公开选择一名玩家。如果他不是恶魔，在当晚他会死亡。
flavor: Kids are... weird.

otherNightReminder: If tomorrow is the final day: wake the Lucky Student.
name: 幸运儿
ability: 在游戏的最后一个白天，你每次投票时可以投两票，且你会在上个夜晚得知此事。当你首次在夜晚死亡时，你不会死亡。
flavor: I'm going to keep moving forward, with hope in my heart.

firstNightReminder: Show the Servant an out-of-play Minion token. Then, show the Demon the same token.
name: 仆从
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一个不在场的爪牙角色：恶魔会获得这个角色的能力。只有恶魔杀死了你，他才会失去这个能力。
flavor: Because I pleaded for my life, they allowed me to live...as their servant.

name: 贵公子
ability: 一名善良玩家会被当作是邪恶阵营，爪牙角色或恶魔角色，即使你已死亡。
flavor: Even as the rest of you fall one by one, I will live and I will win.

otherNightReminder: If the Supreme Leader died today or tonight: up to 2 players may die.
name: 首脑
ability: 如果你死亡，当晚会有两名玩家死亡。如果你“疯狂”证明某条信息是错误的，当你死亡时，可能会有更少的玩家因你的能力而死亡。
flavor: You have no idea how many crazy things I've done, do you?

firstNightReminder: Choose the starting alignment of the Writer.
name: 文学作家
ability: 每个夜晚*，你的阵营会发生转变。在初始设置时，你可能是邪恶的。每局游戏限一次，你会被当作是错误的阵营。
flavor: The world has a front and a back, a top inning and a bottom, a sea of truth and a web of lies!

firstNightReminder: The Anthropologist points to 2 players. Show those players' character tokens.
name: 民俗学家
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你要选择两名玩家：你会得知他们的角色。如果你提名并处决了他们之中的一名玩家，另一名玩家会在当晚死亡。
flavor: People are creatures of greed. At times, that inner ugliness is visible.

firstNightReminder: The Cosplayer points to a player. Place the Cosplay reminder next to that player's character token.
otherNightReminder: The Cosplayer points to a player. Place the Cosplay reminder next to that player's character token.
name: 角色扮演家
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择与上次不同的一名玩家：你会被当作是他的角色和阵营，反之亦然，直到下个黄昏。
flavor: To become a completely different person and feel like you're part of a different world... Doesn't that sound interesting?

otherNightReminder: The Fasionista shows the head signal (nod yes, shake no) for whether they want to die tonight.
name: 时尚偶像
ability: 每个夜晚*，你可以选择杀死自己。如果你死亡，所有玩家会被当作与自身阵营对立的阵营，直到下个黄昏。
flavor: What's wrong with my beautiful face? People have told me I'm cuter than a hundred chihuahuas combined.

firstNightReminder: The Monokuma either shows the "no" head signal, or points to a player. Wake that player. Show the "This character selected you" token and the Monokuma token.
otherNightReminder: If the Monokuma has not yet used their ability: The Monokuma either shows the "no" head signal, or points to a player. Wake that player. Show the "This character selected you" token and the Monokuma token.
name: 黑白熊
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择一名玩家：他会得知此事，如果他提名并处决了一名玩家，他立即转变为邪恶。
flavor: Every human has regrets, has things they'd like to go back and change. But I don't! 'cause I'm a bear.

name: 动画师
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：与被选中的外来者邻近的一名镇民中毒直到下个黄昏。[+1外来者]
flavor: Hehehe, we're all equals when we're sick.

otherNightReminder: The False Hope points to a player. That player dies. If they are a dead Minion, they regain their ability instead.
name: 虚假的希望
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。首个被你选择的死亡爪牙获得一个不在场的爪牙能力。
flavor: Hope is harmony. A just heart, moving toward the light. That is all.

otherNightReminder: The Despair points to a player (or 2 players if an evil player was executed yesterday). Those players die.
name: 绝望
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果有一名邪恶玩家在白天被处决，你要额外选择一名玩家：他死亡。
flavor: Despair is hope's polar opposite. It is messy and confusing. It swallows up love, hatred, and everything else.

otherNightReminder: Show the Audience the Grimoire. The Audience points to a player. That player dies.
name: 观众
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要查看魔典并选择一名玩家：他死亡。可能会有一名善良玩家的角色被错误地展示在魔典上。
flavor: They don't want this kind of ending! They want the killing game to continue!

name: 虚假的希望&时尚偶像
ability: 如果一名爪牙获得了时尚偶像的能力，他的能力变为 "每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以选择让所有玩家被当作与自身阵营对立的阵营，直到下个黄昏。"

name: 女仆&时尚偶像
ability: 如果恶魔获得了时尚偶像的能力，在夜晚时，他可以选择让一名爪牙死亡(不是他自己)以发动时尚偶像的能力。
